[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 1101101 5
2 1101001 4
3 0101101 4
4 1011010 4
5 0010001 2
6 1011101 5
7 0011001 3

23 32 0001111 4

70 07 1111111 a
